title: baccharis macrantha subsp. cocuyensis
intro: Baccharis macrantha subsp. cocuyensis, also known as the Cocuy false buttonbush, is a plant species in the aster family (Asteraceae), native to South America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which are known to have various health benefits. The plant has been traditionally used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and promoting wound healing. Baccharis macrantha subsp. cocuyensis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
